concept.description: Abstract anchor for all logging framework providers.
The classes org.slf4j.Logger, org.apache.commons.logging.Log and java.util.logging.Logger are logging frameworks and labeled as Logger.
concept.cypher: MATCH (:Artifact)-[:REQUIRES]->(logger:Type) WHERE logger.fqn IN ["org.slf4j.Logger", "org.apache.commons.logging.Log","java.util.logging.Logger","org.apache.logging.log4j.Logger"] SET logger:Logger RETURN DISTINCT logger.fqn AS Logger

concept.description: The class org.slf4j.Logger represents the Slf4j logger.
concept.cypher: MATCH (slf4j:Type:Logger) WHERE slf4j.fqn = "org.slf4j.Logger" SET slf4j:Slf4j RETURN DISTINCT slf4j.fqn as Slf4j

constraint.description: Refractor other logging frameworks to Slf4j.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (logger:Type:Logger)-[:DECLARES]->(m:Method), (t:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(:Method)-[usage:INVOKES]->(m) WHERE NOT logger:Slf4j RETURN t.fqn AS Type, logger.fqn AS Logger, collect(usage.lineNumber) AS LineNumbers

constraint.description: System.out or System.err should not be used for logging
constraint.cypher: MATCH (system:Type{fqn: "java.lang.System"})-[:DECLARES]->(writer:Field), (a:Main:Artifact)-[:CONTAINS]->(t:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(m:Method), (m)-[reads:READS]->(writer) WHERE writer.signature in [ "java.io.PrintStream out", "java.io.PrintStream err" ] RETURN t.fqn as Type, writer.signature, collect(reads.lineNumber) as LineNumbers
